# Quarterly revenue by region

| Region        | Q1 2026 | Q2 2026 | Q3 2026 | Q4 2026 |
|---------------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| North America | 48,200  | 51,100  | 53,900  | 57,400  |
| Europe        | 31,800  | 33,450  | 35,200  | 37,100  |
| Asia Pacific  | 22,400  | 24,900  | 27,600  | 30,850  |
| Latin America |  8,150  |  8,900  |  9,725  | 10,640  |

This fixture verifies that OCR preserves tabular data and distinctive
numeric tokens (`48,200`, `30,850`, `Q4 2026`).
